data.title: New documentary explores the quality of milk hailed as 'super food.' Rich in nutrition, milk has been consumed for thousands of years.
data.description: On January 14, 2026, in Beijing, it was highlighted that milk has been a staple in people's diets for millennia due to its highly nutritious composition. Recognized for its balanced and rich nutritional content, milk is often described as a nearly perfect food. Its status as a natural "super food" continues to benefit individuals of all ages on a daily basis.

data.title: New President, Nina Pflumm Herndon, leads the Aging Life Care Association with a focus on growth and innovation.
data.description: In Tucson, Arizona, on January 14, 2026, Nina Pflumm Herndon, MA, CMC, CLPF, CPG, began her role as the President of the Board of Directors at the Aging Life Care Association® (ALCA). This nonprofit organization, comprising over 2,000 members, appointed Herndon to lead as a volunteer.

data.title: LOVB partners with Omaha Productions for live USA Network Game of the Week coverage, a significant venture for both.
data.description: In Los Angeles, League One Volleyball (LOVB), the country's inaugural professional league rooted in the club sector, has revealed a new partnership with Peyton Manning's Omaha Productions to present its weekly Game of the Week broadcasts on USA Network each Wednesday. This collaboration signals Omaha Productions' debut into the realm of volleyball and represents one of its largest live event production ventures thus far. This alliance also signifies a significant milestone for LOVB as they continue to expand their reach and offerings.

US senate kills bill that would mean Trump would need congressional approval for President Donald Trump to carry out further military attacks on Venezuela, with all votes counted. The vote ended 50-50 but Vance broke the tie to kill the bill

data.title: Bluerock High Income Institutional Credit Fund declares 9.0% Q4 2025 distribution, 14th consecutive quarterly payout.
data.description: On January 14, 2026, the Bluerock High Income Institutional Credit Fund, known as the High Income Fund with tickers IIMAX, IIMCX, IIMWX, declared its fourteenth consecutive quarterly distribution. The distribution resulted in a 9.0% current annualized distribution rate.
